_comment: Sample source config and payload contract for AI Server Source Platform. This file is documentation — not loaded by code.

create_source_request.name: Company Policy Knowledge Base
create_source_request.description: Internal policies, guidelines, and process documents

expected_upstream_list_response._description: What the upstream API should return at list_path. Connector looks for 'data', 'items', or 'results' envelope.

expected_upstream_detail_response._description: What the upstream API should return at detail_path_template/{external_id}. Connector probes common field names.

data.title: Remote Work Policy
data.body:
## Remote Work Policy

Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week...
data.author: HR Department

expected_document_metadata_after_sync._description: Metadata shape on the document stored in AI Server after sync. Top-level fields come from connector._extract_metadata(). source_platform block is provenance.
expected_document_metadata_after_sync.author: HR Department

second_source_example._description: Example of how to onboard a second source — just another config, no new code needed.
second_source_example.name: Customer Support FAQ
